selection_bias_assessment.regime_dependency: 8-12c asks only appear during strong DOWN trending regimes. Zero 8-12c during range-bound BTC.
selection_bias_assessment.edge_assessment: Genuine edge during trending regimes. The 8-12c ask IS the signal.

regime_dependency_note: 8-12c asks only appear during strong DOWN trending. Zero trades during range-bound BTC. Paper validation is regime-dependent.
paper_validation_caveat: 287 resolved trades over 7 days (June 7-14). All during trending regime. WR 48.4% is genuine but regime-locked. Range-bound regime produces 0 trades.

conservative_estimate.description: First-observation dedup (more realistic for live trading)
